sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: TripFi acts as a booking agent between travellers and travel suppliers (airlines, hotels, tour operators, etc.). Refund and cancellation terms are primarily determined by the individual travel supplier whose services you have booked. This policy explains both supplier-level and platform-level refund processes.

sections.heading: Supplier Cancellation Policies
sections.content: Each booking is subject to the cancellation policy of the specific supplier. These policies vary widely:
list: Non-refundable: Some fares and hotel rates are entirely non-refundable once booked
Partially refundable: Some bookings allow cancellation with a penalty fee
Fully refundable: Some bookings allow free cancellation within a specified window
Change fees: Modifications to bookings may incur fees set by the supplier
sections.footer: Always review the supplier's cancellation terms before completing your booking. These terms are clearly displayed during the checkout process.

sections.heading: TripFi Platform Fees
sections.content: TripFi charges a service fee for bookings made through our platform. Our platform fee policy:
list: Platform service fees are non-refundable in all circumstances
If a supplier provides a full refund, you will receive the supplier amount minus the TripFi service fee
Platform fees cover the AI planning, booking facilitation, and customer support services

sections.heading: BCH Payment Refunds
sections.content: For bookings paid with Bitcoin Cash (BCH):
list: Refunds are processed in BCH at the prevailing exchange rate at the time of refund
This means the BCH amount refunded may differ from the BCH amount originally paid due to exchange rate fluctuations
TripFi is not responsible for any losses arising from BCH exchange rate movements between payment and refund
BCH refunds are processed within 5–10 business days once approved

sections.heading: How to Cancel a Booking
list: Log in to your TripFi account and navigate to My Trips
Select the booking you wish to cancel
Click "Cancel Booking" and follow the on-screen instructions
Review the cancellation terms and confirm your cancellation
You will receive a confirmation email with any applicable refund details

sections.heading: Refund Processing Times
sections.content: Once a refund has been approved:
sections.footer: Processing times may vary depending on your financial institution.

sections.heading: Disputes
sections.content: If you believe a refund has been incorrectly processed or you are unsatisfied with the refund amount, please contact our support team within 30 days of the refund being issued. We will do our best to resolve any disputes in a fair and timely manner.
